nasb.text: Then he brought me to the nave and measured the side pillars; six cubits wide on each side was the width of the side pillar.

esv.text: Then he brought me to the nave and measured the jambs. On each side six cubits was the breadth of the jambs.

cnv.text: 他領我到外殿，量了牆柱，這邊厚三公尺，那邊厚三公尺，寬窄與會幕相同。

ccb.text: 那人带我进入殿堂，量两边的墙柱，各三米宽。
